bugs.error_message: Gemini worker runs complete with empty output (0 bytes stdout/stderr) but reported as exitCode 0 success
bugs.root_cause: Two independent failures: (1) PowerShell shim does not forward stdin to Gemini (ExpectingInput gate), (2) Gemini CLI 0.37+ relaunches via spawn(process.execPath) which fails with EPERM in detached context on Windows. finalizeGeminiResult treated empty output as success.
bugs.fix: Added resolveGeminiNodeEntrypoint in providers.mjs to bypass PowerShell shim. Injected GEMINI_CLI_NO_RELAUNCH=true in spawn env. Changed finalizeGeminiResult to treat empty output as failure. Added injectedEnv to process.json artifacts.

bugs.error_message: computeCodexDetachedExitCode dropped WRITE_ROUTES distinction — write-mode routes (implement/debug/implement-artifact) incorrectly failed on empty last-message.txt + exit 0
bugs.root_cause: Codex worker implemented simplified empty-output check (always fail on empty) without the WRITE_ROUTES nuance. Contradicted Do-Not-Repeat entry from same session. Route and stderrRaw params were passed to computeCodexDetachedExitCode but the function only destructured finalOutput.
bugs.fix: Restored WRITE_ROUTES set in orchestrator.mjs. computeCodexDetachedExitCode now accepts route+stderrRaw: write routes succeed on empty finalOutput+no-stderr, fail on empty+stderr. runCodexTask in providers.mjs uses options.writeEnabled for same distinction.

bugs.error_message: Codex worker run opens a terminal window on Windows for every worker execution
bugs.root_cause: bin/codex.js (the JS wrapper bundled with @openai/codex) spawns the native codex.exe with `stdio:'inherit'` but no `windowsHide:true`. Our spawn of node.exe (the JS wrapper) had windowsHide:true, but the grandchild spawn of codex.exe did not, causing a console window to flash/appear.
bugs.fix: Added resolveCodexNativeBinary() which locates codex.exe inside @openai/codex/node_modules/@openai/codex-win32-x64/. resolveWindowsCommandWithArgs now tries native binary first; our spawn of codex.exe directly has windowsHide:true end-to-end. JS wrapper fallback retained for non-Windows or if binary not found.
